info.name: B2B API Document
info.description:
**Overview**

This collection contains all B2B API endpoints for Healthians partners.

**Environment Information**

| Environment | {{URL}} |
| --- | --- |
| Staging | [https://t25crm.healthians.co.in/api](https://t25crm.healthians.co.in/api) |
| Production | The production environment URL and credentials will be shared by the respective team at the time of deployment. |

**Usage Instructions**

Select the correct environment before sending requests.

- All endpoints require a Bearer token in the \`Authorization\` header.- Replace \`{{partner_name}}\` with your assigned value.
    

**Endpoint Deprecation & Retirement Policy**

**Deprecated Folder Structure:**

All APIs that are planned for retirement are moved to the Deprecated folder within this collection. These endpoints may still function, but they are no longer recommended for use.

**Grace Period & Retirement Timeline:**

Deprecated endpoints will continue to operate for a minimum of 90 days from the date of deprecation, unless otherwise communicated. After the grace period, they may be removed or return an error.

**Communication & Notifications:**

Any deprecation or retirement updates will be communicated through email

**Documentation Maintenance:**  
The collection and API documentation will be updated regularly. Stakeholders are advised to review the main (active) endpoints and migrate away from any API listed under the Deprecated folder.

**API Versioning & Deprecation Policy**

- **Versioning Approach:**  
    All major changes to the API are released as new versions (e.g., _`v1/`, _`v2/` in the URL path). Existing versions remain available for a defined period to ensure backward compatibility.
    
- **Deprecation Process:**  
    When a new API version is released, the previous version will be moved to deprecated folder in the documentation. Deprecated versions will remain operational for a minimum of 90 days (or as otherwise communicated) before being retired.
    
- **Retirement Timeline:**  
    After the deprecation period, the older version may be removed or may return an error response. The exact retirement date will be communicated in advance.
    
- **Communication:**  
    All version deprecation and retirement notices will be communicated to stakeholders via email and workspace notifications. Please ensure you are subscribed to workspace updates.
    
- **Documentation Updates:**  
    This documentation will be updated promptly to reflect the status of each API version. Stakeholders are encouraged to review the documentation regularly.
    
- **Contact:**  
    For questions or concerns about API versioning or deprecation, contact your business team/stakeholder.

request.description:
**Purpose:**

This API would be used to authenticate all sessions initiated towards Healthians with Partner.

Basic Authentication will be applied in this API.  
We will be providing you an api_key and api_secret_key for fetching the Access Token

**Endpoint:**  
`GET //getAccessToken`

**Parameters:**

- username (string, required): The client identifier issued to your application.
    
- password (string, required): The client secret issued to your application.
    

**Authentication Requirements:**

- No Bearer token required for this request.
    
- Use your assigned username and password as parameters in basic auth.
    

**Example Request:**

``` http
GET {{URL}}/<partner_name>/getAccessToken

 ```

**Example Response:**

``` json
{
  "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
  "token_type": "Bearer",
  "expires_in": 3600
}

 ```

**Notes:**

- The returned `access_token` must be included as a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header for all subsequent API requests.
    
- The token is valid for the duration specified in `expires_in` (in seconds).
    
- If invalid credentials are provided, a 401 Unauthorized error will be returned.
    
- Replace with your assigned partner identifier.
    
- **The TTL of the Access Token will be of 1hour**
    

For more details, refer to the collection-level documentation or contact your API administrator.

request.description:
### Check Serviceability By Location v2

### **Overview**

This API endpoint allows you to check the serviceability of a location. By providing precise location details, the system determines whether services are available in the specified area.

Request Body:

- `lat` (string, required): Latitude of the location.
    
- `long` (string, required): Longitude of the location.
    
- zipcode (string): zipcode of the provided location.
    
- is_ppmc_booking (0/1): Default pass 0 and 1 to check ppmc booking serviceability
    

#### Response:

The response for this request can be represented as a JSON schema:

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "This Lat Long is serviceable.",
    "data": {
        "zone_id": "86"
    },
    "resCode": "RES0001",
    "code": 200
}

 ```

request.description:
### **Overview**

This API endpoint allows partners to retrieve available slots by location (`lat`, `long`), date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format, and `zone_id` (retrieved from `checkServiceabilityByLocation_v2` API). The available slots will be for **today + 7 days**.

Slots will **not** be available for dates **before today** or **after today + 7 days**.

### Request Body

- `slot_date` (string): The date for which slots are to be retrieved.
    
- `zone_id` (string): The ID of the zone for which slots are to be retrieved. You will get zone_id from checkServiceabilityByLocation_v2 API's response.
    
- `lat` (string): The latitude of the location for which slots are to be retrieved.
    
- `long` (string): The longitude of the location for which slots are to be retrieved.
    
- **get_ppmc_slots (int):** When set to `1`, PPMC slots will be included in the response.
    
- **has_female_patient (int):** When set to `1`, the response will include slots valid for female PPMC bookings. This parameter requires `get_ppmc_slots=1` to be enabled.
    
- **amount** key refers to the total booking amount (without any discount given from partner side)
    
- **package** key 1. **deal_id** key contains the combination of deal_type(test type) and deal_type_ids (test_id) combined with “_”.  
    2\. deal_type and deal_type_id can be obtained from getPartnerProducts api or it will be shared by the business team to you manually. 3.Order of mentioned packages (tests) will be considered as the order of customers.

request.description:
This API is used to freeze the slot for a booking.

This API is used to temporarily reserve a booking slot for **15 minutes** to ensure availability during the booking process. If the booking is not completed within this time, the slot may be assigned to another vendor, leading to a booking failure.

The `slot_id` returned in the response **might differ** from the initially requested one, but the **date and time of the slot will remain unchanged**. This `slot_id` must be used in subsequent API calls like `createBooking_v3` or `setSlotForBooking` to confirm the booking.

| **ATTRIBUTE** | **CHILD ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| slot_id |  | Slot id is used to get sample collection date and time which are taken from **checkServiceabilityByLocation_v2** api. | Integer | YES | Integer values are accepted. |
| vendor_billing_user_id |  | Billing user id at vendor’s end. | String | YES | String values are acceptable. |

request.description:
The API **fetches all products** that are available in a given ZIP code. The type of product being requested in key "product_type". It can be: **\-** **`package`** (a group of tests bundled together) **\-** **`profile`** (a set of tests for a specific condition) **\-** **`parameter`** (a single test) **\- Blank (****`""`****)** (returns all available tests in the ZIP code) The type of test being requested in key "test_type". It can be: **\-** **`pathology`** (laboratory tests for blood, urine, etc.) **\-** **`radiology`** (imaging tests like X-ray, MRI, etc.) The response includes **pricing details**, which represent the **agreed price** between **Healthians and the partner**. | **ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | zipcode | 6-digit valid pincode. | Integer | YES - if city_id is not provided. | Valid Zip code.

Either city ID or zip code is required. | | product_type | Product type for which details are needed. | String | NO | package/profile/parameter | | product_type_id | Product type id for which details are needed. | String | NO | String are acceptable | | start | Number From where you want to start | String | NO | String are acceptable | | limit | Limit of data required. | String | NO | String are acceptable | | test_type | Which type of test required. | String | NO | String are acceptable

Allowed test types are pathology,radiology | | client_id | Unique identifier for the sub-account/child entity assigned by Healthians. | Integer | No | Integer is accepted | test_type can be pathology or radiology. To get city_id refer to getActiveZipcodes _API_ #### **Details of Client Id Key (client_id)** Suppose If Company X has integration with multiple sub entities , Company X will share separate **Child Client IDs** for each of them. When pushing an order to Healthians, Company X must include the correct `client_id` in the API request. --- #### **Sample Values Shared by Healthians** | **Child Account Name** | **Child Client ID (Key Name: client_id)** | | --- | --- | | HDFC Ergo Insurance | `1001` | | Bajaj Allianz | `1002` | | Niva Bupa | `1003` |

request.description:
| **ATTRIBUTE** | **CHILD ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | **customer** | | Customer key is to get the details of the customer including child keys mentioned below. | Collection | YES | | | | **customer_id** | Used to uniquely identify each customers. | String | YES | String | | | **customer_name** | Name of the of the customer for whom the test is booked. | String | YES | Only string (alphanumeric with special characters values are allowed on request basis.) | | | **relation** | Relation of customer with billing customer. | String | YES | \- Self
\- Spouse
\- Child
\- Parent
\- Grand parent
\- Sibling
\- friend
\- Relative
\- Neighbour
\- Colleague
\- Others
\- Father in law
\- Mother in law | | | **age** | Age of the of the customer for whom the test is booked. | Integer | YES | Age range between 5-120. | | | **dob** | DOB of customer for whom the test is booked. | Date | NO | Format - "DD/MM/YYYY" | | | **gender** | Customer gender specifies the gender of the person for whom the test is booked. | String | YES | M/F | | | **contact_number** | Customer contact number is passed. | String | NO | Valid contact number should contain digits. | | | **email** | Customer email id . | String | NO | Valid email id | | | **application_number** | Policy no., Loan no or any other vendor application no. can be used. | String | NO | | | | **customer_remarks** | Remarks of customer in booking. | String | NO | | | **sample_collected** | | Send value as

“N” in case of heathians phlebo collect sample.

“Y” in case vendor is collecting samples themselves. | String | NO | If key is not passed the default value will be N.

Y/N are acceptable. | | **zone_id** | | Booking Zone Id required for Healthians system | string | YES | zone_id will be string and zone_id can be fetched from checkServiceabilityByLocation_v2 API's response. | | **slot** | | 1\. Slot contains the details of slots in which slot id is passed.
2\. Valid slot ids are taken from **getSlotsByLocation** api. | Collection | YES | | | | **slot_id** | Slot id is used to get sample collection date and time which are taken from **getSlotsByLocation** api. | Integer | Value is mandatory in case of **sample_collected** key value will be N.

In case of **sample_collected** key value Y no need to pass slot ids. | Integer | | **package** | | Package contains the details of tests including their details. | Collection | | | | | **deal_id** | 1\. Deal id contains the combination of deal_type(test type) and deal_type_ids (test_id) combined with “_”.
2\. Deal_type and Deal_type_id can be obtained from getPartnerProducts api or it will be shared by the business team to you manually.
3\. Order of mentioned packages (tests) will be considered as the order of customers. | Collection | YES | Value should be started by (profile or parameter or package) followed by “_” and deal_type_id .

e.g. profile_1

In case of multiple tests

e.g. profile_1, parameter_1,package_1. | | **customer_calling_number** | | Customer_calling_number is the contact number used to contact customer by phlebotomist. | String | YES | Valid customer calling number should contain digits. | | **billing_cust_name** | | Billing_cust_name is the name of a customer on whose name invoice or bill is generated. | String | YES | | | **gender** | | Gender specifies the gender of the billing customer. | String | YES | M/F | | **mobile** | | Mobile is the contact number of a billing customer. | String | YES | Valid mobile number should contain digits. | | **email** | | Billing Customer email address. | String | YES | Valid email e.g. [example@gmail.com](https://mailto:example@gmail.com) | | **state** | | Valid State id. This can be fetched from the response of getSlotsByLocation. | Integer | NO | Only integer values are acceptable. | | **cityId** | | Valid City id. This can be fetched from the response of getSlotsByLocation. | Integer | NO | Only integer values are acceptable. | | **sub_locality** | | Sub locality is the string that contains locality or area name of address. | String | YES | Strings are acceptable. | | **latitude** | | Customer location latitude. | String | YES | Valid latitude are acceptable. | | **longitude** | | Customer location longitude. | String | YES | Valid longitude are acceptable. | | **address** | | Customer complete Address | String | YES | Strings are acceptable. | | **zipcode** | | Valid 6-digit Zip code | Integer | YES | Only integer values are acceptable. | | **landmark** | | Near By landmark of customer’s location. | String | NO | Strings are acceptable. | | **altmobile** | | Addition contact number | Integer | NO | Only numbers are allowed and last 10 digit numbers are considered. | | **altemail** | | Additional email. | String | NO | If email address is passed then it should be a valid email eg. [example@gmail.com](https://mailto:example@gmail.com) | | **hard_copy** | | Reports of hard copy required or not. | Integer | YES | Only 0 is acceptable.

0 = not required

(Currently hard copy feature is not available). | | **vendor_booking_id** | | Booking id at vendor’s end. | String | NO | String values are acceptable. | | **vendor_billing_user_id** | | Billing user id at vendor’s end . | string | YES | String values are acceptable. | | **payment_option** | | Payment option is used to choose payment method either cod or prepaid method is used.

In case of prepaid, customer do not need to pay any amount to healthians if there is no change in booking amount. | String | YES | **cod**/**prepaid** | | **discounted_price** | | Price after applying discount.

Discounted_price is the price that you want to collect from the customer after discount

Discounted_price default value will be zero (means no discount)

Ex. booking amount is 1000 and you want to give 100 rs discount then discounted_price value will be 900, it will be integer value. | Integer | YES | Integer values.

Decimal values are not allowed. | | **client_id** | | Unique identifier for the sub-account/child entity assigned by Healthians. | Integer | No | Integer values. | | **is_ppmc_booking** | | Only pass if you are creating PPMC booking as 1 | Int | No | 0/1 | **`customer_calling_number`** and **`mobile`** **has to be same**, communication will be done on provided number. **Booking** flow has the capability to handle **multiple customers with multiple packages** in the same booking. **Payment_option can be "prepaid" or "cod".** **zone_id to be retrived from checkServiceabilityByLocation_v2 API** Partner needs to send their **unique cust ids** for each customer. Partner need to **send encrypted** values in **checksum for booking creation**. For partial Payment: - In partial payment some amount will be paid by partner and remaining amount will be collected by healthians during sample collection from customer. - "partial_paid_amount" key will be used and value should be more than 0 and "payment_option" should be "prepaid". #### **Details of Client Id Key (client_id)** Suppose if Company X has integration with multiple sub entities, Company X will share separate **Child Client IDs** for each of them. When pushing an order to Healthians, Company X must include the correct `client_id` in the API request. --- #### **Sample Values Shared by Healthians** | **Child Account Name** | **Child Client ID (Key Name: client_id)** | | --- | --- | | HDFC Ergo Insurance | `1001` | | Bajaj Allianz | `1002` | | Niva Bupa | `1003` | #### Error Messages and Resolution: Error msg-1: Prices for mentioned test are not approved/uploaded. Healthians Low Energy Checkup (package_91) , " **Resolution:** This error comes, when any tests "package_xxxx", "profile_xxxx" or "parameter_xxxx" prices is not availble in requested city, you need to reachout to business team to get price updated. Error msg-2: "checkSum Mismatch" **Resolution:** Need to **send encrypted** values in **checksum for booking creation.** URL for ref for generating encrypted values in checksum in different languages: [https://partners.healthians.com/#/sample_checksum_code?sha256](https://partners.healthians.com/#/sample_checksum_code/sha256) Error msg-3: "Basic Female Package can't be booked for male customer." **Resolution:** Some tests are gender specific, so need to book those which are valid of gender requested. Error msg-4: "Advance Child Care (test) cannot be booked in Gurgaon as Lab is not tagged. Please reach out to Healthians team." **Resolution:** This needs to be esclated to business team. Error msg-5: "This slot has been allocated to another booking, please try selecting another slot." **Resolution:** As message defined that slot has already been consumed, so need to get new availabe slot from **getSlotsByLocation** API. **Error msg-6:** "This phone number attached with different customer" **Resolution:** This error message says that the user once registered with combination of Mobile and vendor_billing_user_id is not exactly same. **The vendor_billing_user_id and customer_id can be retrived** from **getVendorIdDetailsEnd** API.

request.description:
API response return only full/partial latest varified report.

**\*Partial Reports Allowed**\*  
If **allow_partial_report** value ,If this flag is **set to 1**, the system will **send partial reports** whenever they are available.

The user will receive **multiple reports** over time **until** the full report is ready.

Example:

- A blood test consists of **5 parameters**.
    
- **3 parameters are ready today**, so a **partial report** is sent.
    
- The remaining **2 parameters are ready tomorrow**, and then the **full report** is sent.  
    

**\*Full Reports Allowed**\*

If this flag is **set to 0**, the system will **not send partial reports**.

The user will receive **only one response**, which is the **full report**.

**Key Differences Between** **`1`** **and** **`0`**

| `allow_partial_report = 1` | `allow_partial_report = 0` |
| --- | --- |
| Sends **partial reports** before the full report. | Sends **only the final report** when all results are ready. |
| User gets multiple reports over time. | User gets only one report. |
| Useful when some test results are available early. | Useful when users only need the complete report. |

  
  

  
  
  
  

  
  
  
  

If allow_partial_report is 0, we will only give reposne untill full report is availabe.

| **ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| booking_id | Booking ID (Healthians Booking/Order Id) to get report. | Integer | YES | Valid Booking ID. |
| vendor_billing_user_id | Billing user id at vendor’s end . | String | YES | String |
| vendor_customer_id | Vendor customer ID is customer ID at vendor's end. | String | YES | String |
| allow_partial_report | Send this Flag to 1 to fetch report even if its partially available | Integer | YES | 0/1 |

allow_partial_report =1 then the API return the full/partial any report that is latest and verified

allow_partial_report=0 then the API only rerturn the full latest varified report

This API can be used for doing an add-on on an existing booking. - We can add tests on an existing customer(need to use customer_id used in createBooking_v3 API) or we can add new customer with required tests. - The vendor_billing_user_id has to be same as used in createBooking_v3 API. - If both the `customer` and `package` arrays have the **same number of elements**, we can **map** each `customer` with the corresponding `package` based on their index position. - addon_discounted_price : If any add-on is booked on mrp 2000 and discount is 500 then the addon_discounted_price will be “1500”. - addon_order_type = It describe the addon order type. The value can either be "prepaid" or "cod". - Partner need to send encrypted values in checksum for booking addon. | **ATTRIBUTE** | **CHILD ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | order_id | | Order ID is Booking ID of Healthians. | String | YES | Valid booking ID | | customer | | Contains details of customers. | Collection | YES | | | | customer_id | Used to uniquely identify each customers. | String | YES | String values are acceptable. | | | customer_name | Name of the of the customer for whom the test is booked. | String | YES | String values are acceptable. | | | customer_age | Age of the of the customer for whom the test is booked. | Integer | YES | Age range between 5-120 | | | customer_gender | Customer gender specifies the gender of the person for whom the test is booked. | String | YES | M/F | | package | | Package contains the details of tests including their details. | Collection | YES | In case of multiple customer's addon this package collection should be in the same order in which customer collection is defined | | | deal_id | Deal id contains the combination of deal_type(test type) and deal_type_ids (test_id) combined with “_”.

Deal_type and Deal_type_id can be obtained from getPartnerProducts api or it will be shared by the business team to you manually.

Order of mentioned packages (tests) will be considered as the order of customers. | Collection | YES | Value should be started by (profile or parameter or package) followed by “_” and deal_type_id .

e.g. profile_1

In case of multiple tests

e.g. profile_1, parameter_1,package_1. | | vendor_billing_user_id | | Billing user id at vendor’s end . | String | YES | String values are acceptable. | | addon_discounted_price | | Discounted price after addon. | Integer | YES | Integer values.
Decimal values are not allowed. | | addon_order_type | | Payment method used to do addon. | String | YES | **cod**/**prepaid** |

request.description:
This API enables **partners** to cancel a booking by providing a **valid booking ID**. However, cancellation is only allowed under specific conditions:

**Valid Booking Status**

- The booking must be in one of the following statuses before it can be canceled:
    
    - **Order Booked (BS002)** – The booking has only been placed.
        
    - **Sample Collector Assigned (BS005)** – A sample collector has been assigned, but the collection is yet to be completed.
        

**Handling Bookings with Multiple Customers**

- If a **single booking** contains **multiple customers**, then:
    
    - API allows partners to cancel **only a specific customer** from the booking while keeping other customers active.
        

**Partial vs Complete Cancellation**

- **Partial Cancellation**: If only **one** or **a few customers** from a booking need to be canceled, API requests should be made for only those customers.
    
- **Complete Cancellation**: If **all customers** in the booking need to be canceled, the partner must send **multiple API requests**, one for each customer, to fully cancel the booking.  
      
    

| **ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| booking_id | Booking ID (Healthians Booking/Order Id) to check status | Integer | YES | Valid booKing ID |
| vendor_billing_user_id | Vendor billing user id at vendor’s end . | String | YES | String values are acceptable. |
| vendor_customer_id | Vendor customer id at vendor's end . | String | YES | String values are acceptable. |
| remarks | Reason to cancel the booking | String | YES | String values are acceptable. |

request.description: This api is used to cancel order in existing booking, on the basis of customer id and booking id.

The **Reschedule Booking API** allows partners to update the scheduled date and time of a booking for a **future date**. This ensures flexibility for customers who need to modify their appointment. #### **Required Parameters for Rescheduling** To successfully reschedule a booking, the following details must be provided in the API request: - **`booking_id`** → The unique identifier of the existing booking. - **`slot_id`** → The new time slot in which the booking should be rescheduled, this will be retrived from **getSlotsByLocation** API. - **`customer_id`** → All customer ids exist in a booking. - **`reschedule_reason`** → The reason for modifying the booking schedule. **Partial reschedules (for only a subset of customers) are not allowed**. The **response includes a new booking ID**, which will be considered for sample collection. - **Partner need to send encrypted values in checksum for booking addon.** EndFragment | **ATTRIBUTE** | **CHILD ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | booking_id | | Healthians Booking/Order ID | Integer | YES | Valid booKing ID | | slot | | Slot contains the details of slots in which slot you wants to reschedule the booking.

Valid slot ids are taken from getSlotsByZipCode_v1 api. | Collection | YES | | | | slot_id | Slot id is used to get sample collection date and time which are taken from getSlotsByZipCode_v1 api. | Integer | YES | Integer values are acceptable | | customers | | Details of customers. | Collection | | | | | vendor_customer_id | Customer id at vendor’s end. | String | YES | String values are acceptable. | | reschedule_reason | | Reason for rescheduling the booking. | String | YES | String values are acceptable. |

request.description:
This API allows partners to **fetch real-time digital test data** for each parameter within a booking. The data is provided on **customer basis**, enabling to track test results even before the final report PDF is generated.

**Use Cases:**

✅ **Real-Time Test Tracking**

- Customers and partners can **track the progress** of test results without waiting for the final report.
    

✅ **Enhanced User Experience**

- Partners can use this API to build **an engaging dashboard** that dynamically updates as test results become available.
    

✅ **Early Insights for Customers**

- Customers can **view individual test results** as they are updated instead of waiting for the complete report.  
    

| **ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| booking_id | Healthinas Booking/Order ID to get customer digital value. | Integer | YES | Valid booking ID |
| vendor_billing_user_id | Billing user id at vendor’s end . | String | YES | String values are acceptable. |
| vendor_customer_id | Customer id at vendor’s end . | String | YES | String values are acceptable. |

request.description:
Purpose  
The `getSlotsByBookingId` endpoint retrieves available slots for a given booking ID. It supports fetching slots for both resampled and rescheduled bookings, allowing to view and manage booking schedules efficiently.

Required Parameters

- `booking_id` (integer): The unique identifier for the booking (resampled or rescheduled booking ID).
    
- `slot_date` (string, YYYY-MM-DD): The date for which slot information is requested.
    

Authentication  
This endpoint requires Bearer Token authentication. Include the `Authorization` header with a valid token:

```
Authorization: Bearer <your_token>

 ```

### Example Request

``` json
{
  "booking_id": 1387722783994,
  "slot_date": "2025-12-14"
}

 ```

request.description:
This API is designed to **assign a new slot for bookings that have been rejected from the lab’s end** due to specific issues such as **insufficient sample quantity, improper temperature maintenance, or other lab-related rejections**.

When a booking is rejected by the lab, partners can use this API to reassign a **new slot** for sample collection, ensuring that the bookings sample can be recollected.

#### **How to Retrieve the New Booking ID?**

To reassign a slot, partners first need to fetch the **new booking reference ID** from one of the following sources:

1. **`getBookingStatus`** **API** → The rejected booking will contain a **new reference booking ID** (`ref_booking_id`) the status should be **BS0018**.
    
2. **Webhook Notification** → When a booking is rejected, a webhook event is triggered, and the response will contain the new **reference booking ID with status BS018**.  
    

| **ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| booking_id | Booking ID to set slot | Integer | YES | Valid booking ID |
| slot_id | Slot ID needs to be set. slot_id can be fetched from getSlotsByZipCode_v1 API | Integer | YES | Integer values are accepted. |

This API is designed to **retrieve the masked contact number and name of the phlebotomist (phlebo) assigned to a booking**. The purpose of this API is to allow secure and controlled communication between the customer and the assigned phlebo **without revealing the phlebo’s actual phone number**.

🔹 The **masked number will be available only if:**  
✅ A **phlebo is assigned** to the booking.  
✅ The **sample has not been collected yet**.  
✅ The **customer is using the same phone number** that was used during booking (`customer_calling_number, mobile` in `createBooking_v3 API`).  

| **ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| booking_id | Booking ID to get phlebo mask number (This will be the masked number when customer will call to that number, it will connect with Healthians Phlebotomist). | Integer | YES | Valid booking ID |

request.description:
### Download Customer Prescription

This endpoint is used to download the prescription for a customer provided by doctor. It is an HTTP POST request to the specified URL with the partner's name included in the path.

#### Request Body

- `booking_id` (string): The ID of the booking for which the prescription is to be downloaded.
- `consultation_id` (string): The ID of the consultation associated with the prescription.

request.description:
### User Registration

This endpoint allows partners to register users for quick bookings on camp

#### Request Body

- `mobile_number` (string, required): The user's mobile number.
    
- `name` (string, required): The user's name.
    
- `age` (string, required): The user's age.
    
- `gender` (string, required): The user's gender.
    
- `email` (string, required): The user's email address.
    
- `vendor_customer_id` (string, required): The vendor's customer ID.
    
- `dob` (string, required): The user's date of birth.
    
- relation (string, non mandatory). Relation with billing user (Poosible Values of relation-self,spouse,child,parent,grand parent,sibling,friend,native,neighbour,colleague,others)
    

#### Response

The response will be a JSON object with the following properties:

- `status` (boolean): Indicates the status of the registration.
    
- `message` (string): Additional information or error message.
    
- `code` (integer): The status code of the response.
    

#### Example

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "",
    "code": 0
}

 ```

| **ATTRIBUTE** | **CHILD ATTRIBUTE** | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | **customer** | | Customer key is to get the details of the customer including child keys mentioned below. | Collection | YES | | | | **customer_id** | Used to uniquely identify each customers. | String | YES | String | | | **customer_name** | Name of the of the customer for whom the test is booked. | String | YES | Only string (alphanumeric with special characters values are allowed on request basis.) | | | **relation** | Relation of customer with billing customer. | String | YES | \- Self
\- Spouse
\- Child
\- Parent
\- Grand parent
\- Sibling
\- friend
\- Relative
\- Neighbour
\- Colleague
\- Others
\- Father in law
\- Mother in law | | | **age** | Age of the of the customer for whom the test is booked. | Integer | YES | Age range between 5-120. | | | **dob** | DOB of customer for whom the test is booked. | Date | NO | Format - "DD/MM/YYYY" | | | **gender** | Customer gender specifies the gender of the person for whom the test is booked. | String | YES | M/F | | | **contact_number** | Customer contact number is passed. | String | YES | Valid contact number should contain digits. | | | **email** | Customer email id . | String | NO | Valid email id | | | **application_number** | Policy no., Loan no or any other vendor application no. can be used. | String | No | | | **sample_collected** | | Send value as

“N” in case of heathians phlebo collect sample.

“Y” in case vendor is collecting samples themselves. | String | NO | If key is not passed the default value will be N.

Y/N are acceptable. | | **slot** | | 1\. Slot contains the details of slots in which slot id is passed.
2\. Valid slot ids are taken from getSlotsByZipCode_v1 api. | Collection | YES | | | | **slot_id** | Slot id is used to get sample collection date and time which are taken from getSlotsByZipCode_v1 api. | Integer | Value is mandatory in case of **sample_collected** key value will be N.

In case of **sample_collected** key value Y no need to pass slot ids. | Integer | | **package** | | Package contains the details of tests including their details. | Collection | | | | | **deal_id** | 1\. Deal id contains the combination of deal_type(test type) and deal_type_ids (test_id) combined with “_”.
2\. Deal_type and Deal_type_id can be obtained from getPartnerProducts api or it will be shared by the business team to you manually.
3\. Order of mentioned packages (tests) will be considered as the order of customers. | Collection | YES | Value should be started by (profile or parameter or package) followed by “_” and deal_type_id .

e.g. profile_1

In case of multiple tests

e.g. profile_1, parameter_1,package_1. | | **customer_calling_number** | | Customer_calling_number is the contact number used to contact customer by phlebotomist. | String | YES | Valid customer calling number should contain digits. | | **billing_cust_name** | | Billing_cust_name is the name of a customer on whose name invoice or bill is generated. | String | YES | | | **gender** | | Gender specifies the gender of the billing customer. | String | YES | M/F | | **mobile** | | Mobile is the contact number of a billing customer. | String | YES | Valid mobile number should contain digits. | | **email** | | Billing Customer email address. | String | YES | Valid email e.g. [example@gmail.com](https://mailto:example@gmail.com) | | **state** | | Valid State id. This can be fetched from the response of getSlotsByZipCode_v1. | Integer | NO | Only integer values are acceptable. | | **cityId** | | Valid City id. This can be fetched from the response of getSlotsByZipCode_v1. | Integer | NO | Only integer values are acceptable. | | **sub_locality** | | Sub locality is the string that contains locality or area name of address. | String | YES | Strings are acceptable. | | **latitude** | | Customer location latitude. | String | YES | Valid latitude are acceptable. | | **longitude** | | Customer location longitude. | String | YES | Valid longitude are acceptable. | | **address** | | Customer complete Address | String | YES | Strings are acceptable. | | **zipcode** | | Valid 6-digit Zip code | Integer | YES | Only integer values are acceptable. | | **landmark** | | Near By landmark of customer’s location. | String | NO | Strings are acceptable. | | **altmobile** | | Addition contact number | Integer | NO | Only numbers are allowed and last 10 digit numbers are considered. | | **altemail** | | Additional email. | String | NO | If email address is passed then it should be a valid email eg. [example@gmail.com](https://mailto:example@gmail.com) | | **hard_copy** | | Reports of hard copy required or not. | Integer | YES | Only 0 is acceptable.

0 = not required

(Currently hard copy feature is not available). | | **vendor_booking_id** | | Booking id at vendor’s end. | String | NO | String values are acceptable. | | **vendor_billing_user_id** | | Billing user id at vendor’s end . | string | YES | String values are acceptable. | | **payment_option** | | Payment option is used to choose payment method either cod or prepaid method is used.

In case of prepaid, customer do not need to pay any amount to healthians if there is no change in booking amount. | String | YES | **cod**/**prepaid** | | **discounted_price** | | Price after applying discount.

Discounted_price is the price that you want to collect from the customer after discount

Discounted_price default value will be zero (means no discount)

Ex. booking amount is 1000 and you want to give 100 rs discount then discounted_price value will be 900, it will be integer value. | Integer | YES | Integer values.

Decimal values are not allowed. | Mandatory fields (mobile, gender, age, slot_id, deal_id, customer_calling_number, billing_cust_name). Get address. (Home Add, Add2, locality, Landmark, city, state, zip code). Get customer information. (Name, Age, gender, phone, Email, unique vendor user_id ) & related tests and family details. Customer dob format should me in "dd/mm/yyyy". Booking flow must have the capability to handle multiple customers with multiple packages in the same booking. Payment_option can be "prepaid" or "cod". Partner needs to send their unique cust ids for each customer. Partner need to send encrypted values in checksum for booking creation. For partial Payment: - In partial payment some amount will be paid by partner and remaining amount will be collected by healthians during sample collection from customer. - "partial_paid_amount" key will be used and value should be more than 0 and "payment_option" should be "prepaid".

request.description:
This API shall be used to fetch available time slots for sample collection, this will get called every time a user selects a date for sample collection. | **ATTRIBUTE** | CHILD ATTRIBUTE | **DESCRIPTION** | **DATA TYPE** | **MANDATORY** | **ACCEPTED VALUES** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | zipcode | | Valid 6-digit Zip code to check serviceability. | Integer | YES | Valid 6-digit Zip code | | slot_date | | Date for which slot is needed. | String | YES | Valid Date.

Date between tomorrow and coming 7 days are allowed. | | lat | | Latitude from provided zip code. | String | YES | Valid latitude are acceptable. | | long | | Longitude from provided zip code. | String | YES | Valid longitude are acceptable. | | amount | | Amount is total booking amount. | Integer | YES | Integer values are accepted. Amount is only required to show Peak/ Non Peak Slots tht is based on booking amount. Peak and Non-Peak Slots timing is based on customer’s location | | isDeviceSlot | | | | NO | 0/1 ( Value 1 shall be passed if need slot for CGM- continuous glucose monitoring device) | | package | | Package contains the details of tests including their details. | Collection | | | | | deal_id | 1\. Deal id contains the combination of deal_type(test type) and deal_type_ids (test_id) combined with “_”.
2\. Deal_type and Deal_type_id can be obtained from getPartnerProducts api or it will be shared by the business team to you manually.
3\. Order of mentioned packages (tests) will be considered as the order of customers. | Collection | YES | Value should be started by (profile or parameter or package) followed by “_” and deal_type_id .

e.g. profile_1

In case of multiple tests

e.g. profile_1, parameter_1,package_1. |
